messages.content:
self.send_response(200)
self.send_header(‘Content-Type’, ‘text/html’)
self.end_headers()
self.wfile.write((‘’‘
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset=“UTF-8”>
</head>
<body>
结果:
‘’’ + str(result) + ‘</body></html>’).encode(‘utf-8’)) # 把字符串编码为字节串解释每行

The given code is using the `send_response()`, `send_header()`, and `end_headers()` methods from the HTTPServer class to send an HTTP response with a status code of 200 (OK) and a content type of text/html.

After sending the response headers, it writes an HTML response body using the `wfile.write()` method. The HTML body contains a result variable converted to a string and inserted into the HTML response.

Here's the modified code with improved format:

```python
self.send_response(200)
self.send_header('Content-Type', 'text/html')
self.end_headers()

result_html = '''
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
</head>
<body>
结果: {result}
</body>
</html>
'''.format(result=str(result))

self.wfile.write(result_html.encode('utf-8'))
```

In this modified code, the HTML body is created using multi-line strings (triple quotes) for better readability. The result variable is formatted using string interpolation (`{result}`). Finally, the HTML body is encoded and written to the response `wfile`.
翻译

给定的代码使用HTTPServer类的`send_response()`、`send_header()`和`end_headers()`方法发送一个具有状态码200（OK）和内容类型为text/html的HTTP响应。

在发送响应头后，它使用`wfile.write()`方法编写HTML响应正文。HTML正文包含一个转换为字符串并插入到HTML响应中的结果变量。

下面是改进格式的修改后的代码：

```python
self.send_response(200)
self.send_header('Content-Type', 'text/html')
self.end_headers()

result_html = '''
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
</head>
<body>
结果: {result}
</body>
</html>
'''.format(result=str(result))

self.wfile.write(result_html.encode('utf-8'))
```

在这个修改后的代码中，使用多行字符串（三引号）来创建HTML正文，以提高可读性。使用字符串插值（`{result}`）来格式化结果变量。最后，将HTML正文进行编码并写入响应的`wfile`中。
SyntaxError: Non-UTF-8 code starting with '\xa1' in file C:\Users\YL198023\Desktop\main.py on line 18, but no encoding declared; see https://peps.python.org/pep-0263/ for details

The error message suggests that there is a non-UTF-8 character in your code, specifically starting with '\xa1', and that there is no encoding specified.

To resolve this issue, you need to declare the encoding in your Python source file. You can do this by adding the following line at the top of your code file:

```python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
```

This line should be placed before any other code. Once added, the Python interpreter will know to interpret the file using UTF-8 encoding.

Here's the modified code with the encoding declaration:

```python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

self.send_response(200)
self.send_header('Content-Type', 'text/html')
self.end_headers()

result_html = '''
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
</head>
<body>
结果: {result}
</body>
</html>
'''.format(result=str(result))

self.wfile.write(result_html.encode('utf-8'))
```

Remember to save the file with the correct UTF-8 encoding.
翻译

错误信息提示在你的代码中存在一个以'\xa1'开头的非UTF-8字符，并且没有声明编码。

要解决这个问题，你需要在Python源文件中声明编码。你可以通过在代码文件顶部添加以下行来实现：


这行代码应该放在任何其他代码之前。添加后，Python解释器将知道使用UTF-8编码解释该文件。

以下是带有编码声明的修改后的代码：

```python
self.end_headers()

</head>
<body>

</body>
</html>
'''.format(result=str(result))
```

SyntaxError: Non-UTF-8 code starting with '\xa1' in file C:\Users\YL198023\Desktop\main.py on line 18, but no encoding declared; see https://peps.python.org/pep-0263/ for details

The error message you are encountering is indicating that there is a non-UTF-8 character in your Python code file, specifically starting with '\xa1'. This error occurs when the Python interpreter is unable to interpret the character due to a missing or incorrect encoding declaration.

To resolve this issue, you need to declare the correct encoding at the beginning of your Python code file. Add the following line at the top of your code file:

```python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
```

This line tells the Python interpreter to use UTF-8 encoding to read and interpret the file.

Here's the modified code with the encoding declaration:

```python
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

self.send_response(200)
self.send_header('Content-Type', 'text/html')
self.end_headers()

result_html = '''
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
</head>
<body>
结果: {result}
</body>
</html>
'''.format(result=str(result))

self.wfile.write(result_html.encode('utf-8'))
```

Make sure to save the Python code file with the correct UTF-8 encoding to avoid this error.

    self.send_header('Content-Type', 'text/html')
IndentationError: unexpected indent

The error message you are receiving indicates an unexpected indentation error on line 144 of your code. This error typically occurs when there is an indentation mismatch in your code, such as mixing spaces and tabs or using an incorrect number of spaces for indentation.

To fix this issue, you need to ensure consistent and correct indentation throughout your code. Make sure that all lines within a block have the same level of indentation.

Here's an example of how the code should be properly indented:

```python
self.send_response(200)
self.send_header('Content-Type', 'text/html')
self.end_headers()

result_html = '''
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
</head>
<body>
结果: {result}
</body>
</html>
'''.format(result=str(result))

self.wfile.write(result_html.encode('utf-8'))
```

In this example, the lines starting from `self.send_header()` up to `self.wfile.write()` are indented with four spaces.

Check your code and ensure that there are no unexpected indentation errors.
翻译

检查你的代码，确保没有意外的缩进错误。
SyntaxError: invalid character '：' (U+FF1A)

The error message you encountered indicates that there is an invalid character '：' (U+FF1A) in your code. This character is not recognized as a valid character by the Python interpreter.

To resolve this issue, you need to replace the invalid character with a valid one. Instead of using the full-width colon '：' character, use the regular colon ':' character.

Here's the modified code with the invalid character replaced:

```python
self.send_response(200)
self.send_header('Content-Type', 'text/html')
self.end_headers()

result_html = '''
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
</head>
<body>
结果: {result}
</body>
</html>
'''.format(result=str(result))

self.wfile.write(result_html.encode('utf-8'))
```

In this modified code, the full-width colon '：' in the comment line has been replaced with the regular colon ':'. Ensure that you make the same replacement throughout your code.
翻译

你遇到的错误信息表示你的代码中存在一个无效字符'：' (U+FF1A)。Python解释器无法将该字符识别为有效字符。

要解决这个问题，你需要用一个有效的字符替换这个无效字符。不要使用全角冒号'：'，而要使用普通的半角冒号':'。

以下是替换了无效字符的修改后的代码：

```python
self.send_response(200)
self.send_header('Content-Type', 'text/html')
self.end_headers()

result_html = '''

<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
</head>
<body>
结果: {result}
</body>
</html>
'''.format(result=str(result))

self.wfile.write(result_html.encode('utf-8'))
```

在这个修改后的代码中，注释行中的全角冒号'：'被替换为普通的半角冒号':'。确保在整个代码中都进行了相同的替换。
